\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ Because $\Phi$ is the &#34;most irrational&#34; number, it creates a rotational step size that minimizes the occurrence of low-order resonances. 3. The Fibonacci Lattice Algorithm As defined in [ID 1122] , the mapping for the $k$-th node (where $k$ runs from 0 to $N=153,599$) is: Z-Coordinate (Height): We slice the sphere into equal-area disks along the Z-axis. $$
